title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Zomato Restaurant Partners - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Zomato Restaurant Partners - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Zomato Restaurant Partners are looking for an experienced Reservation Manager based out of Chennai. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Zomato Restaurant Partners:
Zomato Restaurant Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Front Office

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zomato Restaurant Partners!
